---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new — a new skill, a new harness, a new SDK component
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

<!-- What are you trying to do? What's getting in the way today? -->

## The ask

<!-- A short description of what you'd like added. Component, skill,
harness, config option, etc. -->

## Who benefits

<!-- Which persona is helped — a maker selling physical goods, a
digital-goods creator, a service business, a handoff-mode operator, etc.? -->

## Is this Phase 1 or Phase 2?

<!-- Bodega's Phase 1 is deliberately narrow: bring-your-own Vercel +
Stripe, physical + digital goods e-commerce, Next.js only, US tax only.
If your ask is outside that, it's fine — but flag it as Phase 2 so we
can roadmap it. -->

- [ ] Phase 1 (in scope now)
- [ ] Phase 2 (nice-to-have, post-PMF)

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Workarounds you tried, similar tools you've seen, etc. -->

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] I'd like to work on this myself (great — open an issue first, we'll discuss shape)
- [ ] I can help test / review
- [ ] I'm just flagging the need
